hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.java) if grep -n 'javax\.' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '// javax OK' | head -5; then echo '⚠️ javax.* 사용 감지! jakarta.* 로 변경하세요. (Spring Boot 4.0)'; fi ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts) if grep -n ': any' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '// any OK' | head -5; then echo '⚠️ any 타입 사용 감지! unknown + 타입 가드로 대체하세요.'; fi ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.tsx) if grep -n 'react-router-dom' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | head -3; then echo '⚠️ react-router-dom 사용 감지! React Router v7에서는 react-router로 import하세요.'; fi ;; esac
